THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARCIE, PATRICIA DETOY DETOY, SHEILA A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPENRODT, JAMES F. $87,231.85 PRINCIPAL, $78,697.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $50,388.94 INTEREST, $3,092.73 COSTS, $16,281.87 PLTF'S EXPENSES WHICH ARE NON-STATUTORY COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $235,692.89, PLAINTIFFS AND EACH OF THEM IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMES FELIX APPENRODT THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS: THE SUM OF $137,620.79, CONSISTING OF THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $87,231.85, TOGETHER WITH INTEREST ON THAT AMOUNT UP TO AND INCLUDING THE DATE OF THE OCTOBER 15, 2007 JUDGMENT IN THE ADDITIONAL AMOUNT OF $50,388.94, AND PLAINTIFFS AND EACH OF THEM IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER FROM THE DEFENDANT JAMES FELIX APPENRODT THE FURTHER AND ADDITIONAL SUMS OF $78,697.50 AS AND FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES, $16,281.87 AS AND FOR EXPENSES WHICH ARE NON-STATUTORY COSTS, AND STATUTORY COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,092.73. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF THIS AMENDED JUDGMENT IS $235,692.89. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
